title: vicia sativa var. hirsutissima
intro: Vicia sativa var. hirsutissima, also known as hairy vetch, is a variety of the vetch plant, a perennial herb belonging to the pea family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dyspepsia, due to its high content of tannins and other compounds. The health benefits of hairy vetch include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Hairy vetch can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusement, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
